name: io.github.easton-ou/rootpilot-ssh-diagnose
description: Read-only SSH diagnostics for your servers: a fixed 38-command whitelist collects evidence (docker, disk, memory, network, logs), redacts secrets, and your model reasons about the root cause. No write path, no arbitrary commands.

environmentVariables.name: RP_HOSTS
environmentVariables.description: Path to your hosts.json (see hosts.example.json in the repo)

environmentVariables.name: RP_PROBE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Target URL for the outbound-connectivity / DNS probes (default: https://cloudflare.com)
